summary: M2 (skill generation templates): Added templates/skill/ with parameterized SKILL.template.md and agents/openai.yaml. Created scripts/generate-skill.py that reads the capability manifest and generates skill folders by rendering templates with manifest data. Verified reproducible generation of autonomous-product-builder skill folder. Code-reviewer approved with non-blocking suggestions for future hardening.
changes: Updated capabilities/project-capabilities.yaml (added generate-skill script entry and profile include)
reviewer_notes: Non-blocking: consider warning on unresolved template placeholders
Non-blocking: .template stripping is substring-based (safe for current templates)
Non-blocking: manifest preserve_existing_files/require_review_for_overwrite not yet enforced (M3 scope)
suggested_commit_message: meta-M2: add skill generation templates and generation script
